testcase.name: convertClaudeToMoliConfig > should convert basic Claude config
convertClaudeToMoliConfig > should convert config with basic fields only
convertClaudeToMoliConfig > should preserve lspServers configuration
convertClaudeToMoliConfig > should throw error for missing name
mergeClaudeConfigs > should merge marketplace and plugin configs
mergeClaudeConfigs > should work with strict=false and no plugin config
mergeClaudeConfigs > should throw error for strict mode without plugin config
isClaudePluginConfig > should identify Claude plugin directory
convertClaudePluginPackage > should only collect specified skills when config provides explicit list
convertClaudePluginPackage > should use all skills from folder when config does not specify skills
convertClaudePluginPackage > should preserve directory structure when collecting skills
convertGeminiToMoliConfig > should convert basic Gemini config from directory
convertGeminiToMoliConfig > should convert config with all optional fields
convertGeminiToMoliConfig > should throw error for missing name
convertGeminiToMoliConfig > should throw error for missing version
isGeminiExtensionConfig > should identify Gemini extension directory with valid config
isGeminiExtensionConfig > should return false when gemini-extension.json does not exist
isGeminiExtensionConfig > should return false for invalid config content
isGeminiExtensionConfig > should return false for config missing required fields
isGeminiExtensionConfig > should return true for basic config without settings
convertSchema > mode: auto (default) > should preserve type arrays
convertSchema > mode: auto (default) > should preserve items array (tuples)
convertSchema > mode: auto (default) > should preserve mixed enums
convertSchema > mode: auto (default) > should preserve unsupported keywords
convertSchema > mode: openapi_30 (strict) > should convert type arrays to nullable
convertSchema > mode: openapi_30 (strict) > should fallback to first type for non-nullable arrays
convertSchema > mode: openapi_30 (strict) > should convert const to enum
convertSchema > mode: openapi_30 (strict) > should convert exclusiveMinimum number to boolean
convertSchema > mode: openapi_30 (strict) > should convert nested objects recursively
convertSchema > mode: openapi_30 (strict) > should stringify enums
convertSchema > mode: openapi_30 (strict) > should remove tuple items (array of schemas)
convertSchema > mode: openapi_30 (strict) > should remove unsupported keywords
convertTomlToMarkdown > should convert TOML with description to Markdown
convertTomlToMarkdown > should convert TOML without description to Markdown
convertTomlToMarkdown > should handle multi-line prompts
convertTomlToMarkdown > should throw error for invalid TOML
convertTomlToMarkdown > should throw error if prompt field is missing
convertTomlToMarkdown > should handle special characters in description
isTomlFormat > should return true for valid TOML
isTomlFormat > should return false for invalid TOML
isTomlFormat > should return true for empty TOML
isTomlFormat > should return false for Markdown format
OpenAIContentConverter > resetStreamingToolCalls > should clear streaming tool calls accumulator
OpenAIContentConverter > resetStreamingToolCalls > should be safe to call multiple times
OpenAIContentConverter > resetStreamingToolCalls > should be safe to call on empty accumulator
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should extract raw output from function response objects
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should prioritize error field when present
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should stringify non-string responses
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should convert function responses with inlineData to tool message with embedded image_url
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should convert function responses with fileData to tool message with embedded image_url
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should convert PDF inlineData to tool message with embedded input_file
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should convert audio parts to tool message with embedded input_audio
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should convert image fileData URL to tool message with embedded image_url
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should convert PDF fileData URL to tool message with embedded file
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should convert video inlineData to tool message with embedded video_url
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should convert video fileData URL to tool message with embedded video_url
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should render unsupported inlineData file types as a text block
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should render unsupported fileData types (including audio) as a text block
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should create tool message with text-only content when no media parts
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToOpenAI > should create tool message with empty content for empty function responses
OpenAIContentConverter > MCP multi-part tool results (issue #1520) > should include all text content in tool message when function response has joined text
OpenAIContentConverter > MCP multi-part tool results (issue #1520) > should include text and image in tool message when function response has media parts
OpenAIContentConverter > OpenAI -> Gemini reasoning content > should convert reasoning_content to a thought part for non-streaming responses
OpenAIContentConverter > OpenAI -> Gemini reasoning content > should convert reasoning to a thought part for non-streaming responses
OpenAIContentConverter > OpenAI -> Gemini reasoning content > should convert streaming reasoning_content delta to a thought part
OpenAIContentConverter > OpenAI -> Gemini reasoning content > should convert streaming reasoning delta to a thought part
OpenAIContentConverter > OpenAI -> Gemini reasoning content > should not throw when streaming chunk has no delta
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToOpenAI > should convert Gemini tools with parameters field
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToOpenAI > should convert MCP tools with parametersJsonSchema field
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToOpenAI > should handle CallableTool by resolving tool function
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToOpenAI > should skip functions without name or description
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToOpenAI > should handle tools without functionDeclarations
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToOpenAI > should handle functions without parameters
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToOpenAI > should not mutate original parametersJsonSchema
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolParametersToOpenAI > should convert type names to lowercase
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolParametersToOpenAI > should convert string numeric constraints to numbers
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolParametersToOpenAI > should convert string length constraints to integers
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolParametersToOpenAI > should handle nested objects
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolParametersToOpenAI > should handle arrays
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolParametersToOpenAI > should return undefined for null or non-object input
OpenAIContentConverter > convertGeminiToolParametersToOpenAI > should not mutate the original parameters
OpenAIContentConverter > mergeConsecutiveAssistantMessages > should merge two consecutive assistant messages with string content
OpenAIContentConverter > mergeConsecutiveAssistantMessages > should merge multiple consecutive assistant messages
OpenAIContentConverter > mergeConsecutiveAssistantMessages > should merge tool_calls from consecutive assistant messages
OpenAIContentConverter > mergeConsecutiveAssistantMessages > should not merge assistant messages separated by user messages
OpenAIContentConverter > mergeConsecutiveAssistantMessages > should handle merging when one message has array content and another has string
OpenAIContentConverter > mergeConsecutiveAssistantMessages > should merge empty content correctly
MCP tool result end-to-end through OpenAI converter (issue #1520) > should preserve MCP multi-text content in tool message (not leak to user message)
MCP tool result end-to-end through OpenAI converter (issue #1520) > should preserve MCP text+image content in tool message
MCP tool result end-to-end through OpenAI converter (issue #1520) > should work correctly when MCP tool returns a single text part
MCP tool result end-to-end through OpenAI converter (issue #1520) > should preserve MCP multi-text + multi-image content in tool message
Truncated tool call detection in streaming > should override finishReason to MAX_TOKENS when tool call JSON is truncated and provider reports "stop"
Truncated tool call detection in streaming > should override finishReason to MAX_TOKENS when provider reports "tool_calls" but JSON is truncated
Truncated tool call detection in streaming > should preserve finishReason STOP when tool call JSON is complete
Truncated tool call detection in streaming > should preserve finishReason MAX_TOKENS when provider already reports "length"
Truncated tool call detection in streaming > should still emit the (repaired) function call even when truncated
Truncated tool call detection in streaming > should detect truncation with multi-chunk streaming arguments
modality filtering > replaces image with placeholder when image modality is disabled
modality filtering > keeps image when image modality is enabled
modality filtering > replaces PDF with placeholder when pdf modality is disabled
modality filtering > keeps PDF when pdf modality is enabled
modality filtering > replaces video with placeholder when video modality is disabled
modality filtering > replaces audio with placeholder when audio modality is disabled
modality filtering > handles mixed content: keeps text + supported media, replaces unsupported
modality filtering > defaults to text-only when no modalities are specified
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > extracts systemInstruction text from string
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > extracts systemInstruction text from parts and joins with newlines
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts a plain string content into a user message
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts user content parts into a user message with text blocks
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts assistant thought parts into Anthropic thinking blocks
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts functionCall parts from model role into tool_use blocks
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts functionResponse parts into user tool_result messages
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > extracts function response error field when present
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > creates tool result with empty content for empty function responses
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts function response with inlineData image parts into tool_result with images
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > renders non-image inlineData as a text block (avoids invalid image media_type)
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts inlineData with PDF into document block
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts fileData with image into image url block
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > converts fileData with PDF into document url block
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > renders unsupported fileData as a text block
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiRequestToAnthropic > associates each image with its preceding functionResponse
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToAnthropic > converts Tool.functionDeclarations to Anthropic tools and runs schema conversion
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToAnthropic > resolves CallableTool.tool() and converts its functionDeclarations
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToAnthropic > defaults missing parameters to an empty object schema
AnthropicContentConverter > convertGeminiToolsToAnthropic > forces input_schema.type to "object" when schema conversion yields no type
AnthropicContentConverter > convertAnthropicResponseToGemini > converts text, tool_use, thinking, and redacted_thinking blocks
AnthropicContentConverter > convertAnthropicResponseToGemini > handles tool_use input that is a JSON string
AnthropicContentConverter > mapAnthropicFinishReasonToGemini > maps known reasons
AnthropicContentConverter > mapAnthropicFinishReasonToGemini > returns undefined for null/empty
AnthropicContentConverter > enableCacheControl > does not add cache_control to system when disabled
AnthropicContentConverter > enableCacheControl > does not add cache_control to messages when disabled
AnthropicContentConverter > enableCacheControl > does not add cache_control to tools when disabled
